I could think of a method in O(N^2) : take a node (out of N possible nodes) to be the starting node, then do dfs to get the minimum cost (O(N)). Total TC : O(N * N). However this will give TLE. 
Kindly help solve this problem.
https://leetcode.com/problems/collect-coins-in-a-tree/  question is not clear from given images but i think its same as this problem
This was for full time or 6 months intern and for which role?\n

Its the Same as https://leetcode.com/problems/collect-coins-in-a-tree/

Two methods to solve this:

1. Leaf node Pruning
2. Re rooting
